 {"id":"bd-55sb","title":"Stealth mode global gitignore should use absolute project path","description":"**GitHub Issue:** #538

**Problem:**
`bd init --stealth` adds `.beads/` to the global gitignore, which ignores ALL `.beads/` folders across all repositories. Users who want stealth mode in one project but open beads usage in others are blocked.

**Solution:**
Change stealth mode to use absolute paths instead of generic patterns:

**Before (current):**
```
# Beads stealth mode configuration (added by bd init --stealth)
.beads/
.claude/settings.local.json
```

**After (proposed):**
```
# Beads stealth mode: /Users/foo/work-project (added by bd init --stealth)
/Users/foo/work-project/.beads/
/Users/foo/work-project/.claude/settings.local.json
```

**Implementation:**
1. Modify `setupGlobalGitIgnore()` in `cmd/bd/init.go`
2. Get current working directory (absolute path)
3. Use absolute path patterns instead of generic ones
4. Update comment to show which project the entry is for

**Tradeoffs:**
- If project directory moves, gitignore entry becomes stale (acceptable - user can re-run `bd init --stealth`)
- Multiple stealth projects = multiple entries (works correctly)

**Testing:**
- Verify absolute path is added to global gitignore
- Verify other projects' .beads/ folders are NOT ignored
- Test with existing global gitignore file
- Test creating new global gitignore file","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"bug","created_at":"2025-12-13T10:55:22.594278-08:00","updated_at":"2025-12-13T10:57:38.0241-08:00","closed_at":"2025-12-13T10:57:38.0241-08:00"}

Add comment for consistency with integrity.go:43 and import.go:316.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2025-11-20T21:31:09.107493-05:00","updated_at":"2025-11-20T21:34:28.378089-05:00","closed_at":"2025-11-20T21:34:28.378089-05:00","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-56p","depends_on_id":"bd-khnb","type":"blocks","created_at":"2025-11-20T21:31:09.108632-05:00","created_by":"daemon"}]}

 {"id":"bd-581b80b3","title":"bd find-duplicates - AI-powered duplicate detection","description":"Find semantically duplicate issues.

Approaches:
1. Mechanical: Exact title/description matching
2. Embeddings: Cosine similarity (cheap, scalable)
3. AI: LLM-based semantic comparison (expensive, accurate)

Uses embeddings by default for >100 issues.

 {"id":"bd-589c7c1e","title":"Fix revive style issues (78 issues)","description":"Style violations: unused parameters (many cmd/args in cobra commands), missing exported comments, stuttering names (SQLiteStorage), indent-error-flow issues.","notes":"Fixed 19 revive issues:
- 14 unused-parameter (renamed to _)
- 2 redefines-builtin-id (max→maxCount, min→minInt)
- 3 indent-error-flow (gofmt fixed 2, skipped 1 complex nested one)

Remaining issues are acceptable: 11 unused-params in deeper code, 2 empty-blocks with comments, 1 complex indent case, 1 superfluous-else in test.","status":"closed","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2025-10-27T23:20:10.391821-07:00","updated_at":"2025-10-30T17:12:58.215077-07:00","closed_at":"2025-10-27T23:02:41.30653-07:00"}
 {"id":"bd-58c0","title":"Fix transaction conflict in TryResurrectParent","description":"Integration test TestImportWithDeletedParent fails with 'database is locked' error when resurrection happens inside CreateIssue.

Root cause: TryResurrectParent calls conn.Get() and insertIssue() which conflicts with existing transaction in CreateIssue.

Error: failed to create tombstone for parent bd-parent: failed to insert issue: sqlite3: database is locked

Solution: Refactor resurrection to accept optional transaction parameter, use existing transaction when available instead of creating new connection.

Impact: Blocks resurrection from working in CreateIssue flow, only works in EnsureIDs (which may not have active transaction).","status":"closed","priority":0,"issue_type":"bug","created_at":"2025-11-04T16:32:20.981027-08:00","updated_at":"2025-11-04T17:00:44.258881-08:00","closed_at":"2025-11-04T17:00:44.258881-08:00","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-58c0","depends_on_id":"bd-d19a","type":"discovered-from","created_at":"2025-11-04T16:32:20.981969-08:00","created_by":"daemon"}]}
